proofMechanism.statement: For every recorded row in the deterministic 22-bucket successor q-avoiding boundary, the previous successor obstruction prime is excluded by the q-avoiding residue condition; smaller primes are inherited as non-obstructions from the prior first-obstruction classifications; the first later prime with roots of y*(y+delta)+1 modulo s^2 gives a row-uniform square-obstruction child for every descendant class of that row.
proofSketch: Read the 718 row classifications from the 20-bucket post-next q-avoiding batch cover and the deterministic 22-bucket successor rank boundary.
Use each row successor q-avoiding class count emitted by the 22-bucket rank boundary as the source class count for this layer.
Skip primes at or below the current successor obstruction prime because the previous layer already made it the first successor obstruction and this q-avoiding layer excludes that prime.
For later primes s, solve y*(y+delta)+1 == 0 mod s^2. The first s with roots is row-uniform across the inherited post-next q-avoiding descendant classes.
All 718 source rows have a first later two-root obstruction prime at or below q277, so all 111,172,518,226,866,898,571,161,320,153 successor q-avoiding classes are classified with no survivors.

proofBoundary: This packet batch-classifies the q-avoiding rank boundary emitted by the deterministic 22 successor buckets: all 111,172,518,226,866,898,571,161,320,153 source successor q-avoiding classes have a row-uniform later square-obstruction child by prime 277. It does not close the 222,345,036,453,733,797,142,322,640,306 post-successor root children, the 5,058,399,114,142,580,922,880,572,195,875,967 post-successor q-avoiding classes, the p479-available branch, the p479-unavailable complement, q97, p443-unavailable, the wider p4217 complement, collision-free matching, or Problem 848.

oneNextAction.action: Run convergence assembly after the 22-bucket successor q-avoiding batch cover and choose whether to compress the 24 post-successor obstruction-prime buckets, prove a structural rank decrease, or emit a deterministic boundary for the enlarged q-avoiding rank surface.
oneNextAction.coveredFamily: The 24 post-successor obstruction-prime buckets emitted from 111,172,518,226,866,898,571,161,320,153 successor q-avoiding classes, with 222,345,036,453,733,797,142,322,640,306 post-successor root children and 5,058,399,114,142,580,922,880,572,195,875,967 post-successor q-avoiding classes.
oneNextAction.finiteDenominatorOrRankToken: Finite token p443_q97_p479_later_prime_15_bucket_next_prime_17_bucket_post_next_20_bucket_successor_22_bucket_q_avoiding_batch_cover grouped by post-successor obstruction primes 149 through 277.
oneNextAction.failureBoundary: If no compression theorem exists, emit a deterministic ranked boundary packet over all 24 post-successor buckets and do not descend into singleton root children.
oneNextAction.completionRule: Assembly must choose bucket compression, structural decomposition, impossibility, or ranked transition before any singleton q-child descent.

nextTheoremMove: Run convergence assembly over the 24 post-successor obstruction-prime buckets emitted by the 22-bucket successor q-avoiding batch cover; singleton q-child descent remains blocked until that assembly selects a finite token.
